title: JoJolion Killer Queen (JCraft: EOE)
description: Replaces KQ (& BTD) skin2 with its appearance from JJL (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Replaces KQ (& BTD) skin2 with its appearance from JJL

I love this recoloration of Killer Queen and I thought you might too.

Changes the apparence of your JoJo stand
